languages.text: "Поговаривают, руки у тебя золотые, Яруб. До того ловкие, что добыть что угодно могут".

traits.locale_text: [драфт] Говорят, к твои рукам все так и липнет...

languages.text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."
languages.original_text: "Поговаривают, руки у тебя золотые, Яруб. До того ловкие, что добыть что угодно могут".

traits.locale_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."
"I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."
"I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

languages.text: «He oído que tiene manos de oro, Jarub. Puede conseguir cualquier cosa con esos dedos tan ágiles».
languages.original_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

traits.locale_text: «He oído que tiene manos de oro, Jarub. Puede conseguir cualquier cosa con esos dedos tan ágiles».

languages.text: “听说你有一双黄金之手，雅鲁布。你这双巧手什么东西都能弄得到。”
languages.original_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

traits.locale_text: “听说你有一双黄金之手，雅鲁布。你这双巧手什么东西都能弄得到。”

languages.text: « On raconte que vous avez des mains en or, Jarub. Que vous êtes capable de chaparder à peu près n'importe quoi. »
languages.original_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

traits.locale_text: « On raconte que vous avez des mains en or, Jarub. Que vous êtes capable de chaparder à peu près n'importe quoi. »

languages.text: "Altın gibi ellerin olduğunu duydum Jarub. O çevik parmaklarınla neredeyse her şeye elini atabiliyormuşsun."
languages.original_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

traits.locale_text: "Altın gibi ellerin olduğunu duydum Jarub. O çevik parmaklarınla neredeyse her şeye elini atabiliyormuşsun."

languages.text: "Es heißt, Ihr habt Hände aus Gold, Jarub. Dass fast nichts vor Euren flinken Fingern sicher ist."
languages.original_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

traits.locale_text: "Es heißt, Ihr habt Hände aus Gold, Jarub. Dass fast nichts vor Euren flinken Fingern sicher ist."

languages.text: 「ジャラブ、あなたは金の手を持つと言われている。あなたの器用な指先で、何でも作れると聞く。」
languages.original_text: "I hear you have hands of gold, Jarub. You can lay your nimble fingers on just about anything."

traits.locale_text: 「ジャラブ、あなたは金の手を持つと言われている。あなたの器用な指先で、何でも作れると聞く。」
